title: [HW] Array*Ops don't accept unpacked arrays
body:
Though there is `hw::UnpackedArrayType`, most of operations are not able to handle that type, e.g:

```mlir
; circt-opt %s
 hw.module @Foo(%a:!hw.uarray<3xi1>, %b: i2) -> (e: i1) {
    %1 = hw.array_get %a[%b] : !hw.uarray<3xi1>
    hw.output %1 : i1
  }
```
will cause a verification failure
```mlir
foo.mlir:4:10: error: custom op 'hw.array_get' 'input' must be an ArrayType, but got '!hw.uarray<3xi1>'
```
